items.name_cn:
Diana 3-Compartment Matte Black 😊
Ultra-matte 🖤SO BLACK
A dark-themed Diana bag

Enough to make you look beautiful and change your mood😊

items.name_cn:
📣📣🔥Limited Time Offer,
Brand New Packaging, Return & Exchange Support❗❗❗
[Small Heart Large Size]
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, offering a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.:1286
Size:42×35×18.5cm
